result.root_cause: Database migration #445 deployed at 14:15 (3 minutes before incident start) added payment_audit_log table without proper indexes, causing full table scans and extreme query performance degradation (query_duration z-score 19.8, lock_wait_time 15.4, deadlocks 12.3, table_scan_rate 10.9, cache_hit_ratio dropped 51%). This database bottleneck caused cascading connection pool exhaustion across 4 services (payment-service, order-service, inventory-service, user-service) as all connection pools filled with threads waiting for slow database queries. Payment-service deployment at 14:23 occurred 8 minutes AFTER incident start and is not the root cause. Memory usage z-score of only 0.8 rules out application connection leak.

fix_options.title: Rollback Database Migration #445
commands: Monitor database query_duration and connection_pool_usage metrics for 5 minutes
fix_options.rollback: Redeploy migration #445: kubectl exec -it db-migration-pod -- flyway migrate

fix_options.title: Add Missing Indexes to payment_audit_log Table
commands: kubectl exec -it postgres-primary-0 -- psql -c "SELECT query, avg_exec_time FROM pg_stat_statements WHERE query LIKE '%payment_audit_log%' ORDER BY avg_exec_time DESC LIMIT 5"
kubectl exec -it postgres-primary-0 -- psql -c "CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_payment_audit_log_timestamp ON payment_audit_log(created_at)"
kubectl exec -it postgres-primary-0 -- psql -c "CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_payment_audit_log_payment_id ON payment_audit_log(payment_id)"
Monitor query_duration and table_scan_rate metrics for 5 minutes
fix_options.rollback: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_payment_audit_log_timestamp; DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_payment_audit_log_payment_id

fix_options.title: Rollback Migration + Restart All Affected Services
commands: kubectl rollout status deployment/payment-service deployment/order-service deployment/inventory-service deployment/user-service
Monitor connection_pool_usage and query_duration across all 4 services for 5 minutes
fix_options.rollback: Redeploy migration #445 and rollback service deployments to previous versions if needed
